import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "adls_file_cleanup"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

#Get load meta from controldb

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

#Join cfg_notebook and cfg_notebook_parameter tables to retrieve source & target meta from controldb

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname) 

#display(df2)

# Retrieve files to delete from controldb

cleanup_folder_1 = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='cleanup_folder_1').collect()[0]["Value"] #cleanup_folder1 name
cleanup_folder_2 = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='cleanup_folder_2').collect()[0]["Value"] #cleanup_folder2 name
cleanup_folder_3 = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='cleanup_folder_3').collect()[0]["Value"] #cleanup_folder3 name


# Create list of files to delete

folder_names = [cleanup_folder_1, cleanup_folder_2, cleanup_folder_3]

#print(folder_names)

#Set params for landing container

destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='datahubdata_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #datahubdata storage name

destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='landing_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Landing container name

#Set params for archive container

destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='datahubdata_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #datahubdata storage name

destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='archive_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Archive container name

#Set params for raw container

destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='datahubsynapse_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #datahubsynapse storage name

destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='raw_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Raw container name
